mapper.select: SELECT StaffID AS staffID, StaffName AS staffName, StaffGender AS staffGender, StaffBirthday AS staffBirthday, StaffIDCard AS staffIDCard, AttendanceStatus AS attendanceStatus, StaffDept AS staffDept, StaffTel AS tel, StaffPwd AS password, StaffPosition AS staffPosition, HireDate AS hireDate FROM user ORDER BY HireDate DESC

SELECT StaffID AS staffID, StaffName AS staffName, StaffGender AS staffGender, StaffBirthday AS staffBirthday, StaffIDCard AS staffIDCard, AttendanceStatus AS attendanceStatus, StaffDept AS staffDept, StaffTel AS tel, StaffPwd AS password, StaffPosition AS staffPosition, HireDate AS hireDate FROM user WHERE StaffID = #{staffID} LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM user WHERE StaffID = #{staffID}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM user WHERE StaffTel = #{tel}
